summary: Completed comprehensive testing of X-CLEAN new features: Image Upload, Inventory CRUD, Statistics PDF Export, Services CRUD, and Workers/Shifts management. All backend APIs working 100%, frontend UI fully functional with excellent user experience.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for resource creation
minor_issues.impact: Minimal - resources are created successfully, just non-standard HTTP status code

passed_tests: Image upload endpoint /api/upload - accepts files and returns base64 data URL
Inventory full CRUD - create, update all fields (name, quantity, min_level, unit, location), delete
Statistics page PDF Export button - functional with jsPDF integration
Services CRUD - create, edit, delete with category tabs (Komplett, Külső, Belső, Extra)
Workers/Shifts CRUD - create and delete shifts with calendar views (weekly/monthly)
Dashboard image upload dialog with before/after image sections
Inventory page with inline editing, low stock warnings, location filtering
Statistics page with multiple charts, KPI cards, location filtering
Services page with category navigation, service cards with pricing
Workers page with calendar navigation, view mode switching, worker legend
All navigation between pages working correctly
Location selectors working on all pages
Responsive UI design with proper dark theme
